projectSummary: Used Docker and ROS2 to develop sensor nodes, and designed high and low level control systems for an autonomous underwater glider.

Demoed in-progress work to the club

projectSummary: This game uses real physics dynamically calculated based on the 3D boat model. Written in C# for the Godot Game Engine.
projectPointsList: Modular boat parts for custom designs
Written in C# for the Godot Game Engine

projectSummary: Inspired by Interstellar (2014)’s black hole that was rendered using bespoke software and real physics.
projectPointsList: Approximated light paths with Newtonian mechanics
Manipulated a background image with gravitational lensing

projectSummary: This game was about swimming through procedurally generated caves and eating schools of fish and growing.
projectPointsList: Procedural generation of caves, cliffs, and islands
Implemented boids algorithm for schooling fish
Written in C# for the Unity Game Engine
